channel.title: Prop Wash Daily
channel.description: Fresh takes for FPV drone pilots and builders.

item.title: The state of Builds in 2026
item.description: A field report on builds: where things stand, and what FPV drone pilots and builders should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Freestyle without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to freestyle for FPV drone pilots and builders — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "fpv drone starter kit" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "fpv drone starter kit" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why FPV drone pilots are rethinking Simulators
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how FPV drone pilots and builders approach simulators — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Regulations on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in regulations — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Freestyle: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping freestyle for FPV drone pilots and builders.
